title: skill-set lock
description:
Generated lock recording the exact content each member of a skill-set resolved to.
https://skill-set.md

version.description: Lock format version. This schema defines version 1; readers fail loudly on unrecognized values.

name.description: Name of the skill-set this lock belongs to; equals the manifest name and the filename stem (<name>.skill-set.lock.json).

setVersion.description:
The manifest version at the time the lock was generated.
https://semver.org

setHash.description: Rollup SHA-256 over the sorted members' locators and content hashes, lowercase hex.

skills.description: One entry per member, keyed by the manifest locator string.

additionalProperties.description: Resolution record for one member skill.

skill.description: The installed skill name (directory name under the skills root).

computedHash.description: Member content hash (SHA-256 of the installed folder per the spec's recipe), lowercase hex.

sourceType.description: Resolver-reported source kind (open vocabulary, e.g. github, git, well-known).

ref.description: Resolver-reported resolved ref (tag or commit), when the source has one.
